failedAssertions.reason: GET /api/jobs/{id} response missing updated_at field. The JobDetailResponse schema in backend/app/schemas/jobs.py does not include updated_at. The _job_to_response() mapping function in backend/app/api/jobs.py also omits it.

Timestamps use malformed format '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ' instead of '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%fZ'. Missing %S (seconds) and decimal separator before %f (microseconds). Produces strings like '22:41:014104Z' instead of '22:41:01.410400Z'. Affects multiple files: backend/app/services/jobs.py, backend/app/services/upload.py, backend/app/services/transcription.py.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: GET /api/memos/{id}/jobs endpoint not implemented. Schema (JobListResponse) and service function (get_jobs_for_memo) exist, but no route handler is registered in the FastAPI router. Request falls through to SPA catch-all.

appliedUpdates.description: Created initial user-testing knowledge base with API surface documentation, environment setup notes, validation concurrency guidance, and flow validator guidance for API surface
No changes needed - services.yaml was accurate
